name: Parse IO
summary: Parse input/output plumbing through rust-htslib and explicit writer behavior.
goal: Support SAM/BAM/CRAM input through rust-htslib, output writers, and compression boundaries without expanding biological/Hi-C semantics.
explicit_non_goals: Do not expand pair formation semantics.
Do not implement sort or downstream commands.
Do not call samtools from Rust runtime.
oracle_commands: pixi run pairtools parse -c tests/fixtures/<case>.chrom.sizes tests/fixtures/<case>.sam
candidate_commands: pixi run cargo run -- parse -c tests/fixtures/<case>.chrom.sizes tests/fixtures/<case>.sam
acceptance_criteria: Rust runtime uses rust-htslib for SAM/BAM/CRAM input.
known_risks: Compression support may need separate milestone boundaries.
